task_params.title: Budget Basics Workshop Outline
visual_section_points: add a visual section after jargon-heavy terminology
use plain-language labels for common budget terms
include icon-based examples for income, bills, savings
show a simple monthly budget flow as a step diagram
address intimidation with a short reassurance note for women
end with a quick confidence-building exercise

attributes.title: Budget Basics Workshop Outline
attributes.content_brief: Main outline for the community budgeting workshop with agenda, terminology section, examples, and closing discussion.

attributes.title: Savings Circle Workshop Outline
attributes.content_brief: Workshop template focused on emergency savings habits and peer discussion prompts.

attributes.title: Visual Teaching Ideas for Adult Learners
attributes.content_brief: Brainstormed notes on icons, color coding, and low-jargon teaching aids for adult education sessions.
